channel.title: P-Stream Notifications (Community Fork)
channel.description: Community continuation updates, announcements, and important notifications for P-Stream users

item.title: P-Stream Revival – Community Fork by ShadowCC / 2clickdeath
item.description:
The original P-Stream (pstream.mov), created and maintained by its founder (Pas / Pasithea0), has been permanently discontinued and shut down as of early March 2026. This followed pressure from anti-piracy groups like ACE/MPA, including a DMCA subpoena targeting Cloudflare, which ultimately led the original owner to take the site offline immediately. The GitHub repositories under the p-stream organization have been archived and set to read-only, marking the end of official updates and hosting.
I'm 2clickdeath from ShadowCC, and I've taken over development by forking the last available public source code. This is now a community continuation / revival fork of P-Stream — keeping the spirit alive for users who loved the ad-light, extension-powered, free streaming experience with Trakt sync, TheIntroDB segments, custom themes, and all the QoL features built up over 2025.
The project is being updated under a new repo/organization (details will be shared soon on relevant communities — look for announcements on piracy-related forums, Reddit subs like r/Piracy, or private channels). We're not affiliated with the original owner anymore, and this is fully independent moving forward.
Major updates coming soon (roadmap highlights): - Password + login protection overhaul — Adding proper user authentication (passphrase + optional 2FA/passkeys) tied to encrypted backend storage. This makes mass account takedowns or "fed visits" much harder by decentralizing/de-anonymizing less and protecting sync data better. - Decentralized / self-host friendly backend options — Multiple backend server choices out of the box, with easier self-hosting guides and fallback proxies to avoid single points of failure / legal pressure. - Enhanced source resilience — More robust FED API / Febbox integration fixes, new community-contributed providers, auto-failover between sources, and better handling of Turnstile / Cloudflare challenges. - Privacy & anti-detection improvements — Better obfuscation for scrapers, stripped telemetry, optional Tor/I2P routing hints, and no mandatory account requirements for core use. - UI/Feature revival + new stuff — Bringing back/fixing things like desktop app builds, watch parties, subtitle translation, auto-skip segments, custom themes, bookmark groups, and more — plus new ideas from the community (e.g. better mobile PWA, offline bookmark sync). - Community-driven — Open to PRs, source contributions, and feedback. If you have archives of old Discord messages, feature requests, or custom sources, reach out!
This won't be taken down as easily — we're building it more resilient from the start.
Stay tuned for the new repo link, updated download instructions (including desktop app), and migration guide (your old data export from pstream.mov should still import if you saved it). If you have questions or want to help test/contribute, drop a message in the usual spots.
Thanks for sticking around — free streaming isn't dead yet. 🏴‍☠️
(First release candidate expected within the next couple weeks, depending on testing.)

item.title: P-Stream v5.3.7 released!
item.description: Minor update this time but some nice quality of life improvements! Changes: - Added a new 'Trakt Sync' setting. You can now sync your bookmarks and watch history to Trakt! - Added colored indicator for intro, recap, credits, and preview segments in the player! - Updated the pause overlay to show the episode rating instead of the show's rating. - Fixed subtitle enable/disable not persisting between episodes or media. - Scroll to top when changing settings categories. - Other small bugs and issues fixed! Thank everyone!

item.title: P-Stream v5.3.6 released!
item.description: WOW, crazy day! Our Discord server got taken down so we had to move to a new one, but I got an update for you! I'm sad to see 25,000 members and thousands of messages gone. I'll take a while to get all of those back up. Especially all the feature requests that we kept track of in discord. 😭 Anyway, we're back up and this time we've got a backup system figured out in case it ever happens again. To make it up to you all, I've released a new version of P-Stream with some bug fixes and improvements. Additions: - Added new 'Pause Overlay' setting to show the title and description of the current media when the player is paused and idle for 10 seconds. - New custom theme! You can now mix and match other themes to create your own custom theme! - Added a new caption match percentage. It uses TheIntroDB to ensure the subtitle doesn't overlap with the credits. - Added "For You" section to the discover page! Pulling from watch history and bookmarks. - Added new "Top 10" Movies section to the discover page! - Added a new 'Auto Skip Segments' setting. - Added support for preview segments from TheIntroDB! - Added a link to the desktop app on the onboarding page. - Added a toggle to disable 0-9 progress keyboard shortcuts. - Made custom source order collapsable. Fixes: - Fixed bookmarking a whole collection removing already bookmarked media from previous bookmark groups. - Hid the chromecast/airplay button when the stream requires extra headers that aren't supported when casting. - Fixed favoriting episodes not populating the favorites 'season' immediately. - Removed 'open in external player' button from the player — it never really worked. - Remove duplicate media from more content pages. - Made the details modal load much faster letting each section load individually. - Synced some settings that weren't already synced to the backend. - Improved season metadata fetching to be faster. - Attempted to fix the subtitles not showing for some users. - Many other bugs and issues! Thanks to everyone who helped build the server back up and get everything running as it was before. Can't express how much I appreciate all of you. Truly amazing community and friends. 🫶 If you know anyone who was in the old server and isn't now, please invite them, that would be appreciated! Also, if you have any archives or content that is missing, please help us add it back! Enjoy all the new features and fixes!
